---
title: "24 March 2026: What are we working on?"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-04-17"
categories: [week_notes]
---

QUT-internal Hansard workshop! 16 attendees, 6 project team members, 2 hours of fun (there's a priceless joke in there somewhere).....

Caught up with CDL Enhanced Analytics, who are working on OCR for colonial Hansards....

Feels good to have brackets back...
